metadataNotes: The assigned source is a PNML.org supplement/reference-page snapshot rather than a complete book or theory chapter with author, publication, and full Petri-net semantics. Supplemented missing operational Petri-net concepts needed for executable orchestration work: places, transitions, tokens, markings, enabling/firing, reachability, deadlock, liveness, boundedness, conflict, concurrency, and PNML portability constraints.
